title: Defining optimal conditions for tumor Extracellular Vesicle DNA extraction for mutation profiling
author: Bruno Costa-Silva
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: We here performed a comprehensive comparison of commonly used approaches for EV-DNA extraction, by assessing DNA quantity, quality and its suitability for downstream analyses. We found that the tested methods resulted in different DNA yields and fragment size. As consequence, we found that different EV-DNA extraction methods have an impact in the detection of specific mutations by qPCR and in the suitability for Next Generation Sequencing (NGS), which can impact downstream clinical applications.
steps_raw: We here performed a comprehensive comparison of commonly used approaches for EV-DNA extraction, by assessing DNA quantity, quality and its suitability for downstream analyses.
